scenario: comparing oneself to peers on social media and feeling inadequate

turns.user_message: Hi. I have this problem where I scroll through Instagram and by the end I hate myself. I know it's curated but it still gets to me.
I know, right? It sounds simple when I say it out loud but it doesn't feel simple.
I think part of it is that I don't even know what I want to get out of talking about it.
Yeah. And what makes it harder is that nobody around me seems to understand.
